product_overview: 빵긋루트 is a single-page web app that provides personalized travel route recommendations via a short quiz and shows live popularity data (donut chart and rankings) powered by Firebase Firestore and Chart.js.
core_goals: Deliver quick, personalized route recommendations from a guided quiz using real route data
Display real-time popularity rankings and visualizations of places using Firestore and Chart.js
Handle common edge cases (network failures, API rate limits, ties, and spam clicks) with clear UX fallbacks
Maintain cross-browser and mobile compatibility with graceful CSS fallbacks
Ensure SPA resource hygiene by properly destroying/recreating Chart.js instances to avoid memory leaks and visual glitches

features.name: Get Route Recommendation
features.description: Guide users through a short quiz to produce a matched travel timeline and a percentage score based on Firestore route data and external place details.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Start route recommendation quiz -> Select companion choice '나홀로 뚜벅이 (1인)' -> Proceed to next step -> Select time choice '1~2시간' -> Proceed to next step -> Select style choice '미션 완수형' -> Submit quiz to generate recommendation -> View matched timeline and rounded percentage on result screen

Navigate to / -> Start route recommendation quiz -> Make selections and submit quiz -> Encounter network error when fetching route data -> See network error message -> Retry submission and receive recommendation or fallback result

Navigate to / -> Start route recommendation quiz -> Make selections and submit quiz -> External place-detail API returns a rate-limit or 500 error -> See partial recommendation with core timeline and an informative warning about missing place details

Navigate to / -> Start route recommendation quiz -> Submit quiz with conditions that produce equal counts for top places -> See recommendation result where the tie is resolved deterministically and ordering is consistent
Navigate to / -> Start route recommendation quiz -> Rapidly submit the quiz multiple times -> Observe that duplicate submissions are blocked and only one recommendation is processed

features.name: View Live Data Dashboard
features.description: Show a live-updating donut chart and ranking list of popular places using route data from Firestore, viewable from the home screen.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll down on home screen to view donut chart and ranking list -> See live rankings populated from Firestore without visual artifacts
Navigate to / -> Scroll down on home screen to view donut chart and ranking list -> Encounter network error retrieving live data -> See network error message and placeholder state prompting retry

Navigate to / -> Scroll down on home screen to view donut chart -> Navigate away from home -> Return to / -> Scroll down on home screen -> Observe chart is destroyed and re-rendered without duplicated tooltips or flicker
Navigate to / -> Scroll down on home screen to view donut chart -> Repeatedly navigate away and back -> Observe duplicated chart artifacts or flickering indicating chart instance was not destroyed

routes.description: Main single page application for routing recommendations

features.name: Get Route Recommendation
features.description: Take a quiz to get a customized travel route recommendation based on real data
user_interactions: Click '나머지 루트 완성하기' on home screen
View the matched timeline and percentage on Result Screen

features.name: View Live Data Dashboard
features.description: View real-time Popular place rankings on home screen
user_interactions: Scroll down on home screen to see the donut chart and ranking list
